headline: Union Pacific (UNP): New Merger Analysis Points To Bigger Supply Chain Ambitions
summary: With an upside potential of 12.18%, Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) is among the Best Transport Infrastructure Stocks to Buy for 2026. On April 30, Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) and Norfolk Southern Corporation submitted an amended merger application to the Surface Transportation Board (STB), seeking approval to establish America’s first transcontinental railroad. Additional analysis indicates that the proposed […]

headline: San Antonio body linked to 6 found dead in Laredo boxcar
summary: Authorities said a body found along train tracks in San Antonio on Monday is connected to the six people discovered dead in a boxcar in a Texas-Mexico border city over the weekend.No arrests have...
